buildCommand: PORT=5000 BASE_PATH=/ pnpm run build && cd ../.. && pnpm exec esbuild --bundle artifacts/equity-health/api/index.ts --platform=node --target=node20 --format=esm --outfile=artifacts/equity-health/api/index.js --external:pg-native --tsconfig=artifacts/equity-health/api/tsconfig.json --banner:js='import{createRequire}from"module";const require=createRequire(import.meta.url);'
